docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,800.00 FILED BY ZHOU, PING AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, PING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.00 SERVED MAR-24-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PING ZHOU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUNPING LUO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, PING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
